architecture_overview: Full-stack MERN application (MongoDB, Express, Next.js, Node.js) with Redux Toolkit state management. Backend serves REST API at /api/v1 with auth controllers, email services, comprehensive middleware stack, and 10 Mongoose models. Frontend is Next.js (App Router) with 3 Redux slices (auth, user, ui), 6 domain services, a layered API client (BaseClient → PublicClient / PrivateClient), and cookie-based token lifecycle with refresh queue.
frontend_status: NEEDS REFACTORING — Multiple architectural violations detected: Redux store directly imported in services, notification-service has undefined StoreAccessor reference (runtime error), activity-service imports non-existent slice, ui-slice is a 564-line monolith, all 6 domain services dispatch Redux actions violating service layer purity, auth-slice uses string-based action matching instead of builder pattern with thunk references, duplicate logout/redirect logic in refresh-queue.js and private-client.js.
backend_status: NEEDS REFACTORING — All 7 auth controllers are fat controllers with embedded business logic (validation, rate limiting, token management, user lookups, password hashing). password-reset.controller.js uses in-memory Map for rate limiting instead of Redis. index.js contains ~140 lines of commented-out legacy code. No use-case layer exists.

critical_tasks.title: Fix activity-service.js importing non-existent notifications slice
Remove direct Redux store imports from domain services
Eliminate duplicate logout/redirect logic in refresh-queue and private-client
Decompose backend fat auth controllers into use-case layer
critical_tasks.risk: HIGH — Business logic locked in Express layer

important_tasks.title: Decompose ui-slice.js monolith (564 lines) into focused sub-slices
Migrate password-reset rate limiting from in-memory Map to Redis
important_tasks.risk: MEDIUM — Data loss on restart, no multi-instance support

important_tasks.title: Replace string-based action matching in auth-slice with builder pattern
Consolidate token lifecycle into single TokenManager
important_tasks.risk: MEDIUM — Scattered token logic across services

important_tasks.title: Remove service-layer side effects (showNotification dispatches) from user-service

enhancements.title: Remove ~140 lines of commented legacy code from backend index.js
Extract backend auth utilities (token-utils, cookie-utils) into dedicated service layer
Remove usage example comments from toast-service, activity-service, ui-service
Consolidate duplicate error handling patterns in backend controllers

validation_reports.details: Replaced direct store import with StoreAccessor import. StoreAccessor.dispatch() now resolves correctly on line 117. Grep verified no remaining direct store imports.

Created store/slices/notifications/ with notifications-slice.js and index.js. Registered in root-reducer.js. Import path @/store/slices/notifications now resolves. State shape state.notifications.items matches activity-service.js usage.

Removed 7 Redux dispatch blocks + 2 imports from user-service.js. Moved notification dispatch to user-thunks.js. Reclassified 4 UI services (toast, ui, notification, activity) from services/domain/ to services/ui/. Created barrel index. Updated file headers. Verified no production imports broken.

Consolidated auth failure into single handleAuthFailure() in refresh-queue.js. Deleted duplicate handleRefreshFailure() from private-client.js. Added no-token short-circuit: cookieService.hasTokens() check → immediate redirect to /login. Removed StoreAccessor and logoutUser imports from private-client.js. Grep verified: handleRefreshFailure gone, handleAuthFailure only in refresh-queue.js.

Created backend/use-cases/auth/ with 7 use-case classes + barrel index (8 files total). Rewrote all 7 auth controllers as thin HTTP adapters (parse request → call use case → format response). Total: ~925 lines of business logic extracted. All route imports verified intact. Controllers export same function names (handleLogin, handleRegister, etc.) — zero breaking changes.

Deleted monolithic ui-slice.js (564 lines). Created 5 new sub-slices (layout, confirmation, scroll, errors, performance) with co-located selectors (10 new files). Updated barrel index.js (8 → 13 sub-slices via combineReducers). Rewrote ui-selectors.js (325 → 48 lines, compound-only). Fixed ui-thunks.js resetTransientUI → individual dispatches. State shape preserved: state.ui.theme, state.ui.layout, etc. All imports via @/store/slices/ui barrel — zero breaking changes.

Replaced in-memory Map() rate limiting in forgot-password.use-case.js with Redis-backed INCR + EX pattern. Added redis import. Uses pwd_reset_limit: key prefix. Pipeline for atomic INCR + EXPIRE. TTL-based time remaining. Same limits preserved (3 email / 6 IP per 15min window). Rate limiting now survives server restarts and works in multi-instance deployments.

Replaced 15 hardcoded string action types in auth-slice.js with proper thunk action creator references (loginUser.pending, etc.). Used lazy require() inside extraReducers to break circular dependency. Verified no remaining string-based addCase calls.

Phased migration (3 phases). Phase 1: Created TokenManager facade at services/auth/token-manager.js. Phase 2: Redirected private-client (hasValidSession), refresh-queue (handleSessionExpired), auth-thunks (clearSession). Phase 3: Removed dead methods from cookie-service.js (setTokens, getRefreshToken, hasTokens). Zero orphaned references confirmed.

Rewrote user-service.js (372 → 274 lines). Fixed 4 side-effect categories: (1) this.normalizeResponse/Error() → imported functions, (2) removed console.error from all catch blocks, (3) separated config from data objects into distinct method params, (4) removed redundant try/catch wrappers. Updated 2 callers in user-thunks.js to match new API signature.

Removed 138 lines of commented-out legacy code from backend/index.js (354 → 215 lines). Included two old server startup implementations, old individual middleware imports, old route configs, and a test error route.
Removed 12 placeholder methods and 2 utility methods from auth-service.js (230 → 97 lines). All removed methods threw 'not yet implemented' and had zero callers. 7 real methods remain.

Extracted token-utils (288 → 190 lines) to services/auth/token-service.js and cookie-utils (63 → 43 lines) to services/auth/cookie-service.js. Removed ~65 lines of commented legacy code from token-utils. Updated 7 consumer imports across 3 use-cases, 3 controllers, and 1 middleware. Dead clearCookie import removed from authTokenMiddleware. Zero remaining references to old paths.

stability_status: All critical tasks completed. C1-C5 fixed. Remaining: I1-I5 (Important), E1-E5 (Enhancement)
notes: Phase 1 audit completed 2026-02-24. Awaiting user command to begin execution.
C1 and C2 are actively broken code paths — should be fixed first.
StoreAccessor DI pattern exists but is inconsistently applied across services.
No automated test suite detected in either frontend or backend.
